  get-keys      Generates Public/Private keys.

  --help       Display this help screen.

  --version    Display version information.

result.stderr:
jira-oauth-cli 1.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 Federico Silva Armas

  -k, --key         Required. The Consumer Key as defined in the OAuth incoming
                    authentication section of the application link in JIRA.

  -s, --secret      Required. The Private Key that was used to generate the
                    public key defiend in the OAuth incoming authentication
                    section of the application link in JIRA.

  --url             Required. (Default: true) Url to the JIRA server.

  -u, --username    Required. The username of the user to get the OAuth tokens
                    for.

  -p, --password    Required. The password of the user.

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.
